input: Father manley fight and mek black pickney go a St Hilda's school, where no black pickney couldn't ben go first time.
target: Manley fought so that black children could go to St Hilda's school, where no black children had been able to go in the old days

input: Him lucky we never nyam him too, for we did done cook already.
target: It's lucky we didn't eat it too, for we had already cooked.

input: Dem deh deh, till she cook and we nyam done.
target: They stayed there until she had cooked and we had finished eating.

input: If yu luk pan we itla did du ina Jaamani.
target: If you consider what Hitler did in Germany.

input: Ten Tauzin yiers ago dem did penichriet aal dem ting.
target: Ten thousand years ago they already understood all those things.

input: Dat manggo chrii dier, notn neva du it.
target: Nothing has ever happened to that mango tree

input: Im no biznis huu it kyach.
target: He didn't care who got shot.

input: Dis wan swiit im.
target: This one pleases her.

input: Im no lov dem ting deh?
target: Doesn't she like those things?

input: Dem mosi nuo.
target: They must have known.

input: Mi hafi gaan.
target: I must leave.

input: Dem kuda kyan bai a bred.
target: They would be able to buy a loaf of bread.

input: Wi wuda mos hafi riich soon!
target: We really ought to arrive soom!

input: My stepfaada had was to tell him not to come back to our yard.
target: My stepfather had to tell him not to come back to where we lived.

input: Him do it because him wanted was to control di people living in di underworld.
target: He did it because he wanted to control the people living in the underworld.

input: She don't fight woman; a pure man she fight.
target: She doesn't fight women; she only fights men.

input: Up to now, Sprangler don't come back in di area.
target: Until this day Sprangler has not come back into the area.

input: Him may leave today to go out to all di countryside, far district, and don't come back tomorrow.
target: He may leave today to go out all over the countyside, and not come back tomorrow.

input: Shut unu ai, na!
target: Shut your eyes, won't you?

input: A di bridj im a taak, duont? Duont a di bridj im a taak?
target: It's the bridge he's talking about, isn't it? Isn't it the bridge he's talking about?

input: No bada gwaan bad.
target: Do not misbehave.

input: Den yu a go kom tinait?
target: Then you're going to come tonight?

input: No mos!
target: Of course!

input: Don't me done tell yuh seh me na go do nutten again.
target: Haven't I told you that i'm not going to do anything further?

input: Nabadii na a kom ina mai aus.
target: Nobody is going to come into my house.

input: If i kyan only get word to him.
target: If I could only get word to him.

input: Mama kyan catch us because we run.
target: Mama couldn't catch us becasue we ran.

input: Ebry day da fishing day, but ebry day no fe catch fish.
target: Every day is a day for fishing, but you won't catch fish every day.

input: A swel it swel, luk da.
target: It certainly swelled up, look there.

input: A bigfut dem gi mi.
target: Someone gave me the bigfoot.

input: luk hou a krievm im krievm.
target: See how greedy she is!

input: A mos im mosi gaan aredi.
target: He must have left already.

input: A gaan im mosi gaan aredi.
target: He must have left already.

input: She waan mi fi come back cause a she one deh deh and she fraid.
target: She wanted me to return for she alone was there and she was afraid.

input: A wisaid unu a go go luk fi im? A wichpaat im de ya?
target: Where are you guys going to look for him? Where is he?

input: Afta it kom oot a di fut, a chrii die schriet hit bon mi.
target: After it came out of my foot, it burned me for three days straight.

input: Lord God! A weh a go tell me madda seh?
target: Lord God! What am I going to tell my mother?

input: Yes, Brer Puss, all di weddin' you was a come a yahso, you was a come eat out di butta!
target: Yes Brother Puss, even the weddings you were coming to here, you were om;y coming to finish eating the butter!

input: Mi ongl se im did shaat!
target: I only said he was short!

input: Yuh wife cook yuh dinner and it deh deh a cold.
target: Your wife cooked your dinner and it sits there getting cold.

input: Dem musn kom ko nobadii no di de an tiicha no da ya.
target: They musn't come because nobody is there and the teacher is not here.

input: Yu hav wan sinting niem ruolin kyaaf.
target: There is something called rolling calf.

input: Him start tell di cousins all sort a someting.
target: He started to tell the cousins all kinds of things.

input: She only do half day work fi come fi follow him go airport.
target: She only worked a half day in order to come here to follow him to the airport.

input: I hard fi kraas di riba.
target: It's hard to cross the river.

input: Di riba haad fi kraas.
target: The river is hard to cross.

input: Jan iizi fi krai.
target: John cries easily.

input: I iizi fi Jan fi krai.
target: It is easy for John to cry.

input: Him fraid fi grab it, for him fraid me tear it.
target: He was afraid to grab it, for he was afraid I would tear it.

input: Him all swear seh him was going to tell me.
target: He even swore that he was going to tell me.

input: Dat mean him deh go tek set pon me.
target: That means that he is going to become malignly fixated upon me.

input: Yu kyaan kom iin ya siev yu pie yu fier.
target: You can't come in here unless you pay your fare.

input: She just tell him dat tru him leggo di secret.
target: She just told him that because he let out her secret.

input: Weneva taim dat im kom, im gwain plie a trik.
target: When she comes she is going to play a prank.

input: No kya we yu go yu naa fain non.
target: No matter where you go, you won't find any.

input: Him ron laka se dem set daag ata im.
target: He ran as if they had set dogs after him.

input: Dis naga man come come collar me de same like a say me da him sexis.
target: This black man comes and collars me just as if I were the same sex as he.

input: Im tek naif kot mi.
target: He cut me with a knife.

input: Kya di buk kom gi mi.
target: Bring the book to me.

input: Manggo de a yaad paas plenti.
target: A great many mangoes are in the yard.

input: Im waan mi fi go kya im kom.
target: He wants me to bring it.

input: Mi a go town.
target: I am going to town.

input: Wah gwaan?
target: What's going on?

input: Mi rate di food
target: I like the food

input: Di pickney dem happy
target: The children are happy

input: Yu miin him a wena mek naiz mam?
target: Do you mean the one that was making noise, ma'am?

input: We have a place weh we call Atom Hole.
target: There is a a place that we call Atom Hole.

input: Mi rispek ar tu di dort we shi waak pan, Mada.
target: I respect her to the ground that she walks on, Mother.

input: Him say me one one hog me have me fi give you.
target: He said I should give you the only hog I have.

input: Mi bring kluoz fi fi uman put aan.
target: I've brought clothes for the woman to put on.

input: Di uman we dem tiif ar biebi gaan a stieshan.
target: The woman that they stole her baby from has gone to the station.

input: Di uman huufa biebi dem tiif gaan a stieshan.
target: The woman whose baby they stole has gone to the station.

input: Mi yu si ya, mi kyaan bada wid dem.
target: I whom you see here, I can't bother with them.

input: Unu kudn bloodclaat gi i man chrii onjid dala.
target: Nobody could even give the man three hundred damn dollars.

input: Ai an ai taakin tu di ai ier.
target: I Have been talking to this man.

input: Black bud lef fe im ticks fe pick fe go pick cow own.
target: Black bird leaves his own ticks to go pick and pick cow's.

input: Mi nuo di fuor touzin mi mek a fi mi!
target: I know the four thousand I made is mine!

input: Den no fi me work me put yuh inna?
target: Then wasn't it my job I got for you?

input: Me did a carry a pan a water from di next door yard for dem did lock off fi we own again.
target: I used to carry a pan of water from the house next door, for they had shut off ours again.

input: Jos bikaaz evribadi wena go luk pan fi Patsi uon.
target: Just because everybody was looking at Patsy's.

input: Mek wi go ina owa pakit an bai di lika oot a wi pakit!
target: Let's reach in our pockets and buy the liquor out of our own pockets.

input: Mi waak kom dong a dis ais kriim plees, likl bit batamsaid di hoos.
target: I walked down to this ice cream place, a little below the house.

input: So wen she go long, she see so so head in de road.
target: As she went along, she saw just a head in the road.

input: Dem miit op dem wan aneda pan di ruod.
target: They met each other on the road.

input: dis ya ting.
target: this thing.

target: this thing.

input: da ting ya
target: this thing.

input: dem ya ting.
target: these things.

target: these things.

target: that thing.

target: that thing.

input: da ting de.
target: that thing.

input: dem de ting.
target: those things.

input: dem ting de.
target: those things.

input: So, dem bwai dem kom an dem fling tuu brik an tuu bakl.
target: So those guys came and threw a few bricks and a few bottles.

input: Hou dem spiik da wie de an wii spiik da wie ya?
target: How come they speak that way, and we speak this way?

input: A dis yah kinda life yuh want? Look pon yuh!
target: Is this the kind of like you want? Look at you!

input: If we did ever see yuh dat deh night, we wuda mek police beat yuh.
target: If we had seen you that night, we would have let the police beat you.

input: Wel natchtali! Mi fiil di anz a dopi, man.
target: Well, naturallu! I have felt the hands of ghosts, man.

input: Me aunty never like we to mix wid we faada family.
target: My aunt didn't like us to mingle with our father's family.

input: She never like we fi go down to mi Granny, me faada madda.
target: She didn't like us to go visit my grandmother, my father's mother.

input: Di honggri ena wip me.
target: Hunger was whipping me.

input: Dat lov, dat ziyl, wa wi did av fors taim, yu don hav it agen.
target: That love, that zeal, we had in the old days, you don't find it anymore.

input: If me sista want a money, she would have to go and meet him.
target: If my sister wanted money, she would have to fo and meet him.

input: Lef dem chiljren op a di hoos.
target: Leave those kids at the house.

input: yav a glas choch op de.
target: There's a glass church up there.

input: Bad man dem taim de!
target: There were bad guys around in those days.

input: Police shoot Starman inna dance, dem rain down gunshot pon him.
target: The police shot Starman at a dance, They rained down gunshots on him.

input: Tings noh bright, bickle noh nuff!
target: Things aren't easy, there's not much food!

input: Afta a no iivn nomba rimemba di nuots dem agen.
target: I don't even remember the notes anymore.

input: Fi dem pieren mait muor richa dan mai pieren, so dem mait av muor beta fasilitiz dem.
target: Their parents might be richer than mine, so they might have better facilities.

input: Frenz an a uol dem, neva falo frenz an a uol.
target: Friends in general, never follow friends in general.

input: Some a di woman dem is single woman.
target: Some of the women are single women.

input: None a di member dem no do notten bout it.
target: None of the members did anything about it.

input: Me pack up me two sinting dem inna two big barrel.
target: I packed up my few possessions in two big barrels.

input: Di man dem in my district is not easy.
target: The men of my district can be truculent.

input: Miss Waaka dem laaf afta im.
target: Miss Walker and the others laughed at him.

input: Mi faati plenti aredi!
target: I am well over forty already!

input: I lub pickney, but I don't lib wid dem.
target: I love children, but I don't live with them.

input: Fowl neber lick him own pickney too hot.
target: A fowl never strikes her own children too hard.

input: Good bwoy sore toe neber well.
target: A good boy's sore toe is never well.

input: Cock mout kill cock.
target: Cock's mouth kill cock.

input: An im a ron op tu di bed.
target: And she is running up to the bed.

input: Wen dem de kot di trii.
target: When are they cutting the tree.

input: Di siem oul wich gwain in.
target: The same old witch is going in.

input: Mi naa taak.
target: I am not talking.

input: Dehn aalzwie a mekop niuu wod.
target: They are always making up new words.

input: Wa yu a du doun de?
target: What are you doing down there?

input: A dis a ya sistim.
target: It is this system.

input: A yu duu mi so!
target: You're doing me like that!

input: A we unu de go?
target: Where are you all going?

input: Wat a yu?
target: What are you?

input: Sens Jumiekan a wahn huoral langwij.
target: Since Jamaican is an oral language.

input: Andro naa piik.
target: Andrew never peeks.

input: Hin de ded!
target: He is dying!

input: we dem de sie.
target: What are they saying?

input: Andro nuo de go hapm.
target: Andrew knows it is going to happen.

input: Wen wilyam de pan di brink.
target: When william is on the brink.

input: De nuo we de don.
target: They know what they are doing.

input: Di trii gyal gwain in.
target: The three girls are going in.

input: dem wor iitin.
target: They were eating.
